anchor: What's the current value of our assets?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores all asset records including purchase and depreciation details. Used to calculate the current value of all assets.
[FIELD] gross_purchase_amount | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the original purchase price of the asset. Used in the calculation of the current value.
[FIELD] accumulated_depreciation | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores the total depreciation that has been applied to the asset. Subtracted from the purchase amount to determine the current value.

anchor: Which assets are fully depreciated?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores all asset records including purchase and depreciation details. Used to identify assets where the accumulated depreciation equals the purchase amount.
[FIELD] gross_purchase_amount | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the original purchase price of the asset. Compared with accumulated depreciation to identify fully depreciated assets.
[FIELD] accumulated_depreciation | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores the total depreciation that has been applied to the asset. Compared with the purchase amount to identify fully depreciated assets.

anchor: What's the total purchase amount of assets bought last year?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores all asset records including purchase and depreciation details. Used to filter assets purchased within the last year and sum their purchase amounts.
[FIELD] purchase_date | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the date the asset was purchased. Filtered to include only assets purchased last year.
[FIELD] gross_purchase_amount | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the original purchase price of the asset. Summed to calculate the total purchase amount of assets bought last year.

anchor: Which assets are due for depreciation this month?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores all asset records including purchase and depreciation details. Used to identify assets due for depreciation based on their next depreciation date.
[FIELD] next_depreciation_date | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the date the next depreciation is due. Filtered to include only assets with a next depreciation date in the current month.

anchor: What's the total depreciation for assets bought from supplier ABC?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Contains all asset records including purchase and depreciation details. Used to filter assets purchased from a specific supplier and sum their accumulated depreciation.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Links each asset to a specific supplier. Filtered to include only assets purchased from supplier 'ABC'.

[FIELD] accumulated_depreciation | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores the total depreciation that has been applied to the asset. Summed to calculate the total depreciation for assets bought from the specified supplier.

anchor: How many assets were purchased in Q1?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores all asset records including purchase and depreciation details. Used to count assets purchased within a specific time period.
[FIELD] purchase_date | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the date the asset was purchased. Filtered to include only assets purchased in Q1.

anchor: Which assets are in the 'Office Equipment' category?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores all asset records including purchase and depreciation details. Used to filter assets based on their category.
[FIELD] asset_category | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Classifies each asset into a specific category. Filtered to include only assets in the 'Office Equipment' category.

anchor: What's the total value of assets in warehouse XYZ?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores all asset records including purchase and depreciation details. Used to calculate the current value of all assets in a specific warehouse.
[FIELD] warehouse | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Indicates the storage location of the asset. Filtered to include only assets in warehouse 'XYZ'.
[FIELD] gross_purchase_amount | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the original purchase price of the asset. Used in the calculation of the current value.
[FIELD] accumulated_depreciation | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores the total depreciation that has been applied to the asset. Subtracted from the purchase amount to determine the current value.

anchor: Which assets were purchased from supplier ABC in the last 6 months?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores all asset records including purchase and depreciation details. Used to filter assets based on their supplier and purchase date.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Links each asset to a specific supplier. Filtered to include only assets purchased from supplier 'ABC'.
[FIELD] purchase_date | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the date the asset was purchased. Filtered to include only assets purchased in the last 6 months.

anchor: What's the total depreciation for assets in the 'Office Equipment' category?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Contains all asset records including purchase and depreciation details. Used to filter assets based on their category and sum their accumulated depreciation.
[FIELD] asset_category | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Classifies each asset into a specific category. Filtered to include only assets in the 'Office Equipment' category.

[FIELD] accumulated_depreciation | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores the total depreciation that has been applied to the asset. Summed to calculate the total depreciation for assets in the specified category.

anchor: What's the current value of our assets?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Contains all the assets of the company. Used to calculate the current value of all assets.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Indicates the current status of the asset. Filtered to include only 'In Location' assets.
[FIELD] gross_purchase_amount | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the purchase price of the asset. Summed to calculate the total value of assets.

anchor: Which assets are fully depreciated?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Contains all the assets of the company. Used to identify fully depreciated assets.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Indicates the current status of the asset. Filtered to include only 'Fully Depreciated' assets.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Identifies the specific asset. Used to list the fully depreciated assets.

anchor: What assets did we acquire last year?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Contains all the assets of the company. Used to filter assets based on acquisition date.
[FIELD] purchase_date | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the date when the asset was purchased. Filtered to include only assets purchased last year.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Identifies the specific asset. Used to list the assets acquired last year.

anchor: Which assets are due for maintenance this month?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset Maintenance | desc: Stores the maintenance schedule for each asset. Used to identify assets due for maintenance.
[FIELD] asset_name | [TABLE] tabAsset Maintenance | desc: Links each maintenance schedule to a specific asset. Used to list the assets due for maintenance.
[FIELD] next_maintenance_date | [TABLE] tabAsset Maintenance | desc: Represents the date of the next scheduled maintenance. Filtered to include only dates falling in this month.

anchor: What's the total depreciation for this quarter?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset Depreciation | desc: Records depreciation entries for each asset. Used to calculate total depreciation for a period.
[FIELD] parent | [TABLE] tabAsset Depreciation | desc: Links each depreciation entry to its parent asset. Required to apply date filtering from the asset header.
[FIELD] depreciation_amount | [TABLE] tabAsset Depreciation | desc: Represents the amount depreciated. Summed to calculate total depreciation.
[FIELD] depreciation_date | [TABLE] tabAsset Depreciation | desc: Represents the date of depreciation. Filtered to restrict results to the current quarter.

anchor: Which assets are in the warehouse?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Contains all the assets of the company. Used to identify assets based on location.
[FIELD] location | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Indicates the current location of the asset. Filtered to include only 'Warehouse' assets.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Identifies the specific asset. Used to list the assets in the warehouse.

anchor: What's the total purchase value of assets from supplier ABC?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Contains all the assets of the company. Used to calculate the total purchase value from a specific supplier.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Links each asset to a specific supplier. Filtered to include only assets from 'ABC'.
[FIELD] gross_purchase_amount | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the purchase price of the asset. Summed to calculate the total value of assets from the supplier.

anchor: Which assets were sold last month?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset Movement | desc: Records all asset movements including sales. Used to identify assets sold in a specific period.
[FIELD] purpose | [TABLE] tabAsset Movement | desc: Indicates the purpose of the asset movement. Filtered to include only 'Sale' movements.
[FIELD] asset_name | [TABLE] tabAsset Movement | desc: Links each movement to a specific asset. Used to list the assets sold.
[FIELD] transaction_date | [TABLE] tabAsset Movement | desc: Represents the date of the asset movement. Filtered to include only dates from last month.

anchor: What's the net book value of our assets?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Contains all the assets of the company. Used to calculate the net book value of all assets.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Indicates the current status of the asset. Filtered to include only 'In Location' assets.
[FIELD] net_book_value | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the net book value of the asset. Summed to calculate the total net book value.

anchor: Which assets are insured?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset Insurance | desc: Stores insurance details for each asset. Used to identify insured assets.
[FIELD] asset_name | [TABLE] tabAsset Insurance | desc: Links each insurance record to a specific asset. Used to list the insured assets.
[FIELD] insurance_status | [TABLE] tabAsset Insurance | desc: Indicates the current insurance status of the asset. Filtered to include only 'Insured' assets.

anchor: How many assets are currently in use?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores asset details including status and item code. Used to filter assets by their current status.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the current status of the asset. Filtered to 'In Use' to answer the question.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Primary asset identifier. Counted to determine the total number of assets in use.

anchor: What's the total value of our assets?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores asset details including gross purchase amount. Used to calculate the total value of all assets.
[FIELD] gross_purchase_amount | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the purchase price of the asset. Summed to calculate the total value of all assets.

anchor: Which assets were purchased last year?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores asset details including purchase date. Used to filter assets by their purchase date.
[FIELD] purchase_date | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the date the asset was purchased. Filtered to 'last year' to answer the question.
[FIELD] asset_name | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Identifies the specific asset. Used to list the assets purchased last year.

anchor: Who are the suppliers for our assets?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores asset details including supplier information. Used to retrieve the suppliers of our assets.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Links each asset to a specific supplier. Used to list the suppliers of our assets.
[TABLE] tabSupplier | desc: Master data table containing supplier details such as name and contact information. Joined to display readable supplier names.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabSupplier | desc: Primary supplier identifier used for display.

anchor: What's the depreciation value for our assets this year?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores asset details including depreciation information. Used to calculate the depreciation value for the current year.
[TABLE] tabDepreciation Schedule | desc: Contains individual depreciation entries for each asset. Used to retrieve the depreciation amounts.
[FIELD] parent | [TABLE] tabDepreciation Schedule | desc: Links each depreciation row to its parent asset. Required to apply depreciation calculation from the asset header.
[FIELD] depreciation_amount | [TABLE] tabDepreciation Schedule | desc: Represents the depreciation amount for each period. Summed to calculate total depreciation for the year.
[FIELD] schedule_date | [TABLE] tabDepreciation Schedule | desc: Represents the date of the depreciation entry. Filtered to restrict results to the current year.

anchor: Which assets are due for depreciation next month?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores asset details including depreciation information. Used to filter assets due for depreciation.
[TABLE] tabDepreciation Schedule | desc: Contains individual depreciation entries for each asset. Used to retrieve the depreciation dates.
[FIELD] parent | [TABLE] tabDepreciation Schedule | desc: Links each depreciation row to its parent asset. Required to apply depreciation calculation from the asset header.
[FIELD] schedule_date | [TABLE] tabDepreciation Schedule | desc: Represents the date of the depreciation entry. Filtered to 'next month' to answer the question.
[FIELD] asset_name | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Identifies the specific asset. Used to list the assets due for depreciation next month.

anchor: What's the total purchase cost of assets from supplier ABC?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores asset details including supplier and purchase cost. Used to calculate the total purchase cost of assets from a specific supplier.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Links each asset to a specific supplier. Filtered to 'ABC' to answer the question.
[FIELD] gross_purchase_amount | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the purchase price of the asset. Summed to calculate the total purchase cost from supplier ABC.

anchor: Which assets are currently in maintenance?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores asset details including status. Used to filter assets by their current status.
[FIELD] status | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the current status of the asset. Filtered to 'Maintenance' to answer the question.
[FIELD] asset_name | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Identifies the specific asset. Used to list the assets currently in maintenance.

anchor: What's the net book value of our assets?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores asset details including net book value. Used to calculate the net book value of all assets.
[FIELD] net_book_value | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the net book value of the asset. Summed to calculate the total net book value of all assets.

anchor: Which assets were disposed last month?
positives: [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Stores asset details including disposal date. Used to filter assets by their disposal date.
[FIELD] disposal_date | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Represents the date the asset was disposed. Filtered to 'last month' to answer the question.
[FIELD] asset_name | [TABLE] tabAsset | desc: Identifies the specific asset. Used to list the assets disposed last month.
